arts.ttl: Are tensions between anti and pro-BlueCo Strasbourg supporters easing?
arts.sum: For the first 15 minutes of each RC Strasbourg Alsace game this season, the ultras have remained silent in protest at the BlueCo ownership. The UB90 have made it clear…

arts.ttl: Why Lyon’s Thiago Almada could return for brief stint at Botafogo
arts.sum: From Botafogo to Olympique Lyonnais, then back to Botafogo and then finally, back to Lyon once more: that could be the path taken by Thiago Almada (23). The Argentina international…
